hero.text: Believe in the magic within you.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day for action! Seize opportunities that come your way.
aries.love: Communicate openly with your partner; honesty will strengthen your bond.
aries.career: Take initiative at work; your leadership qualities will shine.

taurus.general: Patience will be your ally today. Don't rush your decisions.
taurus.love: A gentle approach in your relationship will foster more intimacy.
taurus.career: Focus on building lasting relationships with colleagues; teamwork is key.

gemini.general: Your curiosity leads you to new places; embrace spontaneity.
gemini.love: Share your thoughts and ideas with your significant other to deepen your connection.
gemini.career: Your versatility is an asset today; use it to tackle diverse tasks.

cancer.general: Emotional awareness is heightened; trust your intuition.
cancer.love: Make time for romance and affectionate gestures; it will mean a lot.
cancer.career: Listen to your instincts in business decisions; they won't steer you wrong.

leo.general: Your charisma attracts attention; make sure to use it wisely.
leo.love: Expect surprises in your love life; keep an open heart.
leo.career: Showcase your talents; this is your moment to shine in the workplace.

virgo.general: Focus on details to avoid mistakes; precision is crucial today.
virgo.love: A practical approach in love will solve any misunderstandings.
virgo.career: Organizational skills will lead to a productive day at work.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: It's not about ideas. It's about making ideas happen.
professional.author: Scott Belsky

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
motivation.author: Albert Schweitzer

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Shine bright, like the star you are.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Every day is a fresh start!
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Live in the moment and make it beautiful.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Hustle until your haters ask if you're hiring.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: If you think adventure is dangerous, try routine—it’s lethal!
fun.author: Paul Coelho

fun.text: Do not take life too seriously; you will never get out of it alive.
fun.author: Elbert Hubbard

fun.text: I am on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: The secret of staying young is to live honestly, eat slowly, and lie about your age.
fun.author: Lucille Ball

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
faith.author: Christian D. Larson

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Have faith in yourself and in the future.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Time will pass, and seasons will change.
wisdom.author: Horace

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the beginning is knowledge, and the end is the understanding.
wisdom.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates
